valueProp.title: Wellness, the gentle way
valueProp.body: Hannature is a behavior-first wellness program that meets you where you are.

behavioral.title: Small habits, real change
behavioral.body: Pick a goal that matters to you. We'll guide you with daily nudges, recipes, and movement — never weight or BMI.

privacy.title: Privacy by design
privacy.body: You control your data. Granular consent, versioned legal text, and EU GDPR compliance from day one.

goal.title: What would you like to focus on?
goal.subtitle: Pick one to start. You can change this any time.

move_more.label: Move more
move_more.description: Build a sustainable activity habit at your own pace.

eat_better.label: Eat better
eat_better.description: Discover recipes and nutrition guidance you'll actually enjoy.

sleep_better.label: Sleep better
sleep_better.description: Improve sleep quality with calmer evenings and steady routines.

reduce_stress.label: Reduce stress
reduce_stress.description: Practice breathing, mindfulness, and gentle daily resets.

build_habits.label: Build habits
build_habits.description: Stack small wins into long-term change you can feel.

consent.title: A few quick consents
consent.subtitle: We're transparent about what we collect and why. Tap any item to read the full text.

termsOfService.label: I accept the Terms of Service
